macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Fed Keeps Rates Steady at 3.5%-3.75% in Split 8-4 Vote, Raises Inflation Alarm Amid Oil Surge
items.summary: The Federal Reserve held benchmark rates unchanged in a rare split vote with four dissenters, the first since 1992, while noting elevated inflation due to higher oil prices from Middle East conflict. Markets await Fed Chair Powell's comments ahead of his term ending in May.

items.title: US Stocks Slip as Markets Brace for Magnificent 7 Earnings from Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft
items.summary: Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq declined ahead of key tech earnings, with focus on whether AI spending translates to revenue growth; Seagate rallied 17% on strong profit outlook boosting AI hopes.

items.title: Bank of England Holds Rates at 3.75% Amid Iran War and Strait of Hormuz Closure Risks
items.summary: BoE kept rates steady while warning of inflation potentially hitting 6.2% in worst-case oil price surge scenario from prolonged Hormuz closure; Brent crude spiked over $126/barrel.

items.title: Dollar Strengthens, Yen Slips Past 160 as Oil Surges on Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: US dollar firmed against major currencies amid Fed's inflation concerns and rising oil prices; USD/JPY up 0.13%, EUR/USD +0.04%, with yen weakening significantly.

items.title: US Q1 GDP Forecast at 2.3% Annualized, Signaling Resilience Despite US-Iran War Shock
items.summary: Economists expect robust US GDP growth for Q1 despite impacts from Iran conflict, with investors eyeing data amid heightened geopolitical uncertainty.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Meme Sector Sees Gains as Dogecoin Rises 7.40%
items.summary: The Meme cryptocurrency sector experienced a 3.89% increase over the past 24 hours, with Dogecoin leading gains at 7.40%, bucking broader market weakness.

items.title: Crypto Market Cap Falls 1.09% Amid Third Consecutive Day of Decline
items.summary: The overall cryptocurrency market cap declined to $2.53 trillion over the past 24 hours, marking the third consecutive day of gradual market decline despite Dogecoin's outperformance.

items.title: Bitwise CIO Says STRC Issuance Fueling Bitcoin's Latest Rally
items.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan attributes Bitcoin's recent rally to Strategy's STRC issuance, suggesting it may support continued BTC purchases.

items.title: Pump.fun Burns $370M in PUMP Tokens, Commits Half of Next Year's Revenue to Buybacks
items.summary: The platform announced a major token burn of $370 million in PUMP tokens and committed to allocating half of next year's revenue toward buyback initiatives.

items.title: TON Launches Agentic Wallets for AI Agent Transactions on Telegram
items.summary: TON blockchain introduced Agentic Wallets enabling AI agents to execute transactions directly through Telegram.

items.title: Polymarket in Talks with CFTC to End Four-Year Ban on American Customers
items.summary: The prediction market platform is negotiating with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission to lift its four-year restriction on U.S. customer access.

items.title: Galaxy Digital Posts $216 Million Net Loss in Q1 as Crypto Market Falls 20%
items.summary: The cryptocurrency investment firm reported a significant quarterly loss amid a 20% decline in the broader crypto market.

items.title: Israel Clears First Shekel-Backed Stablecoin After Two-Year Review
items.summary: Israeli regulators approved the country's first stablecoin backed by the shekel following an extended regulatory review process.

items.title: Gemini Unveils Agentic Trading for AI-Executed Crypto Trades
items.summary: The cryptocurrency exchange launched a new feature allowing AI models to autonomously execute cryptocurrency trades on the platform.

items.title: US Seized Nearly $500M in Iranian Crypto as Operation Economic Fury Escalates
items.summary: U.S. authorities seized approximately $500 million in Iranian cryptocurrency holdings as part of Operation Economic Fury, reportedly sending the Iranian regime into crisis.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Launches Gemini Deep Research: World's Most Powerful AI Agent
items.summary: Google released Gemini Deep Research, an advanced AI agent that performs deep analysis, builds charts, writes full reports, and operates in the background, with an upgraded Deep Research Max version for extended overnight processing.

items.title: China Integrates Deepseek AI into Xiong'an Smart City
items.summary: Xiong'an, China's AI-controlled city with over 1 million residents, integrated Deepseek, a powerful AI language model, into its urban computing center in 2025, enabling real-time management, predictive traffic control, and direct citizen interaction via a city brain handling 33 billion data records.

items.title: Mastra Unveils Observational Memory: New State-of-the-Art for AI Agents
items.summary: Mastra introduced observational memory, a four-level agent memory system topping LongMemEval benchmarks at ~95%, using Observer and Reflector agents to compress conversations into stable, cacheable observations modeled on human memory, powering their open-source coding agent.

items.title: OpenAI Scales Stargate Project for AGI Compute Infrastructure
items.summary: OpenAI is expanding its Stargate initiative by adding new data center capacity to build the compute infrastructure needed for AGI amid surging AI demand.

items.title: Paperclip: Open-Source Platform for Autonomous AI Teams
items.summary: Paperclip, an open-source orchestration platform with over 44,000 GitHub users, enables hiring AI employees with job titles and tasks for fully autonomous company operations without manual triggering.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 Delayed to May 2026
items.summary: Rockstar Games has delayed Grand Theft Auto 6 to May 26, 2026, delivering the anticipated bad news to fans.

items.title: Nioh 3 Announced with PS5 Demo Available Now
items.summary: Team Ninja and Koei Tecmo announced Nioh 3 during Sony’s June State of Play, allowing soulslike fans to play a demo immediately on PS5.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Confirms June 2025 Wave 1 Lineup
items.summary: Microsoft revealed the full list of games joining Xbox Game Pass in the first wave of June 2025 ahead of the Xbox Games Showcase.

items.title: Bloodstained Sequel The Scarlet Engagement Revealed
items.summary: ArtPlay unveiled The Scarlet Engagement, a new Bloodstained game that diverges significantly from Ritual of the Night, during June's PlayStation State of Play.

items.title: Final Fantasy Tactics - The Ivalice Chronicles Launches September 2025
items.summary: A remaster of Final Fantasy Tactics titled The Ivalice Chronicles is set to launch in September.

items.title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Achieves Highest-Grossing Premiere of 2026
items.summary: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie recorded the highest-grossing premiere of 2026, tracking slightly behind its predecessor globally.

items.title: No More Heroes Developer Announces New Ultraviolent Sci-Fi Game
items.summary: Suda51 and Grasshopper Manufacture revealed a new over-the-top action game blending No More Heroes and Dead Rising elements.

items.title: Helldivers 2 Reveals ‘Force of Law’ Warbond
items.summary: Helldivers 2 announced a new Force of Law Warbond, available soon for players in the cooperative shooter.

items.title: Nintendo Takes Legal Action Against Alleged Switch 2 Leaker
items.summary: Nintendo is pursuing legal action against accessory maker Genki for allegedly misleading consumers regarding Switch 2 information.

items.title: Sony Responds to Backlash Over New PlayStation DRM Policy
items.summary: Sony officially addressed the massive backlash sparked by its new DRM policy on PlayStation.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Qualcomm Q2 Revenue Down 3% to $10.6B but Shares Jump 12% on Data Center Progress
items.summary: Qualcomm reported Q2 revenue of $10.6B, down 3% YoY, but shares surged over 12% pre-market after announcing progress in data centers with a top hyperscaler set to use its chips later in 2026.

items.title: Microsoft Q3 Intelligent Cloud Revenue Hits $34.68B, Beating Estimates with 40% Azure Growth
items.summary: Microsoft's Q3 Intelligent Cloud revenue reached $34.68B, exceeding $34.27B estimates, driven by 40% YoY growth in Azure and other cloud services; the company also issued higher capex guidance for 2026.

items.title: Quantum Motion Deploys First Full-Stack Quantum Computer Using Standard Silicon Fabrication
items.summary: Quantum Motion achieved a milestone by deploying the first full-stack quantum computer built with standard silicon chip processes, potentially accelerating scalable quantum computing systems.

items.title: Google and Qualcomm Push Android PCs to Challenge Microsoft and Apple in Personal Computing
items.summary: Google and Qualcomm are advancing Android PCs into the mainstream, scaling the mobile OS to desktops in a bid to reshape personal computing and compete with Microsoft and Apple.

items.title: Sony Denies PlayStation Will Check Game Licenses Every 30 Days
items.summary: Sony clarified that rumors of a new DRM system requiring PlayStation consoles to check game licenses every 30 days are untrue.

items.title: YouTube Picture-in-Picture Mode Rolls Out to All Users Worldwide
items.summary: YouTube's picture-in-picture mode is now available to all users globally, not just Premium subscribers.

items.title: Uber Adds Hotel Booking Feature Directly in Its App
items.summary: Uber introduced new travel features, allowing users to book hotels via the app alongside other enhancements for trips away from home.
